author: T Savo

operations.name: mov
operations.stateTransformer: dst := src, with 32-bit register writes zero-extending into the parent 64-bit register

operations.name: movzx
operations.stateTransformer: dst := zero_extend(src)

operations.name: movsx
operations.stateTransformer: dst := sign_extend(src)

operations.name: lea
operations.stateTransformer: dst := effective_address(src)

operations.name: add
operations.stateTransformer: dst := dst + src modulo width; update ZF, SF, CF, OF

operations.name: sub
operations.stateTransformer: dst := dst - src modulo width; update ZF, SF, CF, OF

operations.name: inc
operations.stateTransformer: dst := dst + 1 modulo width; update ZF, SF, OF; preserve CF

operations.name: dec
operations.stateTransformer: dst := dst - 1 modulo width; update ZF, SF, OF; preserve CF

operations.name: and
operations.stateTransformer: dst := dst bitand src; update ZF and SF; clear CF and OF

operations.name: or
operations.stateTransformer: dst := dst bitor src; update ZF and SF; clear CF and OF

operations.name: xor
operations.stateTransformer: dst := dst bitxor src; update ZF and SF; clear CF and OF

operations.name: shl
operations.stateTransformer: dst := dst << count modulo width; update ZF, SF, CF, OF

operations.name: shr
operations.stateTransformer: dst := logical_right_shift(dst, count); update ZF, SF, CF, OF

operations.name: sar
operations.stateTransformer: dst := arithmetic_right_shift(dst, count); update ZF, SF, CF, OF

operations.name: cmp
operations.stateTransformer: compute lhs - rhs modulo width; update ZF, SF, CF, OF; do not store result

operations.name: test
operations.stateTransformer: compute lhs bitand rhs; update ZF and SF; clear CF and OF; do not store result

operations.name: push
operations.stateTransformer: rsp := rsp - 8; memory[rsp] := src

operations.name: pop
operations.stateTransformer: dst := memory[rsp]; rsp := rsp + 8

operations.name: leave
operations.stateTransformer: rsp := rbp; rbp := memory[rsp]; rsp := rsp + 8

operations.name: jmp
operations.stateTransformer: pc := target

operations.name: je
operations.stateTransformer: branch when ZF is true

operations.name: jne
operations.stateTransformer: branch when ZF is false

operations.name: jl
operations.stateTransformer: branch when signed-less condition holds

operations.name: jle
operations.stateTransformer: branch when signed-less-or-equal condition holds

operations.name: jg
operations.stateTransformer: branch when signed-greater condition holds

operations.name: jge
operations.stateTransformer: branch when signed-greater-or-equal condition holds

operations.name: js
operations.stateTransformer: branch when SF is true

operations.name: jns
operations.stateTransformer: branch when SF is false

operations.name: call
operations.stateTransformer: push return address and transfer control to target

operations.name: ret
operations.stateTransformer: pop return address and return current machine state

operations.name: nop
operations.stateTransformer: identity

equations.name: seq-assoc
equations.law: seq(seq(a, b), c) = seq(a, seq(b, c))

equations.name: for-desugar
equations.law: for(init, cond, step, body) = seq(init, while(cond, seq(body, step)))

cidNotes: Shared flow-control operations and laws are expected to collide by CID with C11 and aarch64 once byte-identical operation mementos are minted.
This file is a draft spec artifact. It is not signed or minted in this crate.
semanticsNotes: The checked-in lifter hand-writes a core subset only.
Full x86-64 semantics should be generated from sail-x86, k-x86, or x86sem.
